title: PsiGlassEdge
description: PsiGlassEdge: A Psi value representing the linear thermal bridging value in W/m2 at a glass to frame edge interface.

PsiValue.description: The Psi value for the interface.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.
